hero.description: I design and build digital products that are modern, performant, and built to scale. From SaaS platforms to AI integrations. Precision engineering for ambitious projects.

about.label: // about
about.headline: Engineering digital products with <accent>precision</accent> and purpose.
about.description: I build production-grade SaaS platforms, AI-powered applications, and modern web experiences for clients who need more than just code. They need a technical partner who understands product, design, and business.

01.title: Product Engineering
01.desc: Full-stack SaaS platforms from architecture to deployment. Next.js, React, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Stripe integrations.

02.title: AI Integration
02.desc: LLM-powered features, intelligent automation, chatbots, and custom AI pipelines integrated into production applications.

03.title: Frontend Craft
03.desc: Pixel-perfect interfaces, advanced animations, 3D web experiences, and performance-obsessed responsive design.

ai.title: AI & Automation
ai.desc: LLMs, chatbots, intelligent pipelines, and business process automation.

backend.title: Backend & APIs
backend.desc: Node.js, Python, FastAPI. RESTful and GraphQL architectures at scale.

saas.title: SaaS Platforms
saas.desc: Multi-tenant architecture, billing, dashboards, and user management.

modernization.title: Modernization
modernization.desc: Legacy migration, performance optimization, and code maintainability.

database.title: Data Layer
database.desc: PostgreSQL, Prisma ORM, schema design, and high-performance queries.

payments.title: Payments
payments.desc: Stripe integration, subscriptions, webhooks, and transaction management.

devops.title: DevOps
devops.desc: CI/CD, Docker, Vercel, AWS deployment and monitoring.

security.title: Security
security.desc: Authentication systems, role management, and compliance standards.

performance.title: Performance
performance.desc: Bundle optimization, Core Web Vitals, and Lighthouse 100 scores.

project1.description: Complete SaaS platform for billing and Factur-X compliance. Built for SMEs and freelancers who need automated invoicing, real-time analytics, and integrated payment workflows.

project2.description: AI-powered invoice extraction platform for accounting firms. Automates supplier invoice capture with 99.2% accuracy, exception-first workflow, and native integrations with QuickBooks, Xero, and custom APIs.

contact.label: // get in touch
contact.headline: Let's build something <accent>together</accent>.
contact.description: Have a project in mind? I'm available for new collaborations. Let's discuss your goals and make them real.

success.title: Message sent
success.description: Thank you. I'll get back to you shortly.

error.title: Failed to send
error.description: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js, Three.js & Framer Motion
